pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::render_next_frame_owned(&mut self, core::option::Option<&dyn enough::Stop>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<zencodec::OwnedAnimationFrame>, E>
pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::render_next_frame_to_sink(&mut self, core::option::Option<&dyn enough::Stop>, &mut dyn zencodec::decode::DecodeRowSink) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<zencodec::decode::OutputInfo>, E>
pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::wrap_sink_error(zencodec::decode::SinkError) -> E

pub trait zencodec::decode::DecodeJob<'a>: core::marker::Sized
pub type zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::AnimationFrameDec: zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder<Error = Self::Error> + core::marker::Send + 'static
pub type zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::Dec: zencodec::decode::Decode<Error = Self::Error>

pub fn zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::animation_frame_decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<Self::AnimationFrameDec, Self::Error>

pub trait zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder: core::marker::Sized
pub type zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder::Error: core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub fn zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder::frame_count(&self) -> core::option::Option<u32>
pub fn zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder::info(&self) -> &zencodec::ImageInfo
pub fn zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder::loop_count(&self) -> core::option::Option<u32>
pub fn zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder::render_next_frame(&mut self, core::option::Option<&dyn enough::Stop>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<zencodec::AnimationFrame<'_>>, Self::Error>
pub fn zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder::render_next_frame_owned(&mut self, core::option::Option<&dyn enough::Stop>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<zencodec::OwnedAnimationFrame>, Self::Error>
pub fn zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder::render_next_frame_to_sink(&mut self, core::option::Option<&dyn enough::Stop>, &mut dyn zencodec::decode::DecodeRowSink) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<zencodec::decode::OutputInfo>, Self::Error>
pub fn zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder::wrap_sink_error(zencodec::decode::SinkError) -> Self::Error
impl<E: core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static> zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder for zencodec::Unsupported<E>
pub type zencodec::Unsupported<E>::Error = E
pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::frame_count(&self) -> core::option::Option<u32>
pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::info(&self) -> &zencodec::ImageInfo
pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::loop_count(&self) -> core::option::Option<u32>
pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::render_next_frame(&mut self, core::option::Option<&dyn enough::Stop>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<zencodec::AnimationFrame<'_>>, E>
pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::render_next_frame_owned(&mut self, core::option::Option<&dyn enough::Stop>) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<zencodec::OwnedAnimationFrame>, E>
pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::render_next_frame_to_sink(&mut self, core::option::Option<&dyn enough::Stop>, &mut dyn zencodec::decode::DecodeRowSink) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<zencodec::decode::OutputInfo>, E>
pub fn zencodec::Unsupported<E>::wrap_sink_error(zencodec::decode::SinkError) -> E
pub trait zencodec::decode::Decode: core::marker::Sized
pub type zencodec::decode::Decode::Error: core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub fn zencodec::decode::Decode::decode(self) -> core::result::Result<zencodec::decode::DecodeOutput, Self::Error>
pub trait zencodec::decode::DecodeJob<'a>: core::marker::Sized
pub type zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::AnimationFrameDec: zencodec::decode::AnimationFrameDecoder<Error = Self::Error> + core::marker::Send + 'static
pub type zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::Dec: zencodec::decode::Decode<Error = Self::Error>
pub type zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::Error: core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub type zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::StreamDec: zencodec::decode::StreamingDecode<Error = Self::Error> + core::marker::Send
pub fn zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::animation_frame_decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<Self::AnimationFrameDec, Self::Error>
pub fn zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<Self::Dec, Self::Error>
pub fn zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::dyn_animation_frame_decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn zencodec::decode::DynAnimationFrameDecoder>, zencodec::encode::BoxedError> where Self: 'a, Self::AnimationFrameDec: core::marker::Send
pub fn zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::dyn_decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn zencodec::decode::DynDecoder + 'a)>, zencodec::encode::BoxedError> where Self: 'a
pub fn zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::dyn_streaming_decoder(self, alloc::borrow::Cow<'a, [u8]>, &[zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor]) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn zencodec::decode::DynStreamingDecoder + 'a)>, zencodec::encode::BoxedError> where Self: 'a, Self::StreamDec: core::marker::Send
pub fn zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::extensions(&self) -> core::option::Option<&dyn core::any::Any>
pub fn zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::extensions_mut(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&mut dyn core::any::Any>
pub fn zencodec::decode::DecodeJob::output_info(&self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<zencodec::decode::OutputInfo, Self::Error>

pub fn (dyn core::error::Error + 'static)::limit_exceeded(&self) -> core::option::Option<&zencodec::LimitExceeded>
